productName: Raging Goat - RG - Hash Rosin - Solventless Badder - Maui Wowie - 1g
description: Solventless sativa hash rosin crafted in two patient steps from Maui Wowie: an ice-water hash wash followed by a low-temp press into rich, fragrant rosin. The cleanest expression of the strain — with notes of tropical, pineapple, and citrus, with an active, daytime spark.
